_comment: Example Claude Code MCP config showing the Vaara proxy in front of community SAP MCP servers. The primary block uses @sap/mdk-mcp-server (SAP's official Mobile Development Kit MCP server, published on npm). Two sibling _alternative_* blocks show the same proxy shape with mario-andreschak/mcp-abap-abap-adt-api (clone+build) and lemaiwo/btp-sap-odata-to-mcp-server (clone+build). Copy the relevant block into your Claude Code mcp config.

_alternative_abap_adt._comment: mario-andreschak/mcp-abap-abap-adt-api is not published to npm. Clone the repo, run npm install and npm run build, then point --upstream-arg at the built dist/index.js. SAP_URL/USER/PASSWORD/CLIENT come from your SAP system (NetWeaver ABAP Developer Edition, S/4HANA dev, BTP free tier, etc.).

_alternative_btp_odata._comment: lemaiwo/btp-sap-odata-to-mcp-server: clone and build per that repo's README, then point --upstream-arg at the built entry point.
